examples: The three men were rebel Hutu.
Now, officially, no one is a Hutu or Tutsi; there are only Rwandans.
Zaire, 1994 - Hutu refugees were struck by cholera and buried in mass graves.
Those now in power led the rebel army that drove out the Hutu killers in 1994.
In Rwanda in 1994, the world watched while the Hutu majority slaughtered some 700, 000 Tutsis.
